# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php 
/*
Plugin Name: User Authentication Plugin
Description: This is a simple WordPress user authentication plugin that stores, verifies & manages user passwords securely with hashing algorithms. The plugin handles user registration and login authentication.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

// Ensure this file cannot be accessed directly
if ( ! defined( 'ABSPATH' ) ) { die; }

class UserAuthPlugin {
    function __construct() {
        // Actions and filters go here
		add_action('wp', array($this, 'handleLogin'));
	}
    
	function handleLogin(){
	    if (isset($_POST['username']) && isset($_POST['password'])) {
		    $user = username_exists( $_POST['username'] );
		    if(!$user) wp_die("User does not exist.");
		        
    		//check password against WordPress
		    if (wp_check_password($_POST['password'], get_userdata($user)->data->user_pass, $user)) {
			    // login success
			    wp_setcookie($_POST['username'], '', time()-3600);
		        return true;
		    } else {
		        // password incorrect
		        wp_die("Incorrect username or password."); 
		    }
	    }
	}
	    
	function registerUser(){
	    if (isset($_POST['username']) && isset($_POST['password'])) {
	        // make sure the user name is not already taken
		    $user = username_exists( $_POST['username'] );
		    if(!$user) {
    			$userdata = array(
        		'user_login' => $_POST['username'], 
        		'user_pass'  => $_POST['password'], 
					// more user fields can be added here...
    			);
			    $userId = wp_insert_user($userdata) ; // Inserts new WordPress User and returns its ID on success. Returns WP_Error object on failure.
    			$_SESSION['username'] = $_POST['username'];
    			$_SESSION['password'] = $_POST['password']; 
			    return true;
		    } else {
		        // user already exists
		        wp_die("Username is taken."); 
		    }  
		}
	}
}
new UserAuthPlugin();
